query: host city and year of the latest Summer Olympics
answer: The latest Summer Olympics were held in 2024 in Paris, France. This is Paris's third time hosting the Summer Olympics. The next Summer Olympics will be in Los Angeles in 2028.

results.title: Summer Olympics by host city 1896-2024 - Statista
results.snippet: In 2024, Paris is set to host the Summer Olympics for the third time since their creation in 1896. The French capital and London have hosted the most Games.
